news.title: Komedyen Deniz Göktaş hakkında soruşturma başlatıldı
news.summary: Komedyen Deniz Göktaş hakkında İstanbul Cumhuriyet Başsavcılığı tarafından soruşturma başlatıldı. Soruşturmaya "Bir kısım sosyal medya platformlarında yayınlamış olduğu içeriklerde suç unsuru ifadeler" tespit edilmesi sebep gösterildi.

news.title: Suriyelilere çalışma izni muafiyeti getirilmesi ne anlama geliyor?

news.title: Paraguay Almanya'yı penaltılarda eleyerek son 16'ya kaldı
news.summary: Paraguay, Dünya Kupası son 32 turunda karşı karşıya geldiği Almanya'yı penaltılarda 4-3 yenerek son 16'ya yükseldi.

news.title: Gülistan Doku soruşturmasında yeni gelişme. Aile avukatından, 108 kamu görevlisine suç duyurusu

news.title: Kavurucu sıcaklara dikkat! Uzmanlardan uyarı. "Mecbur olmayan dışarı çıkmasın"
news.summary: Avrupa'da ölümlere neden olan sıcak hava dalgası Türkiye'yi de etkisi altına aldı. Sıcaklık 5 ila 7 derece yükselecek. Özellikle yaşlılar, kalp ve damar rahatsızlığı olanların daha dikkatli olması gerekiyor.

news.title: "Çilek Dolunayı" İstanbul manzarasıyla birleşti
news.summary: "Çilek Dolunayı" olarak da bilinen ay, İstanbul ve Ankara'da gökyüzünde eşsiz görüntüler oluşturdu.

news.title: Kabine bugün toplanıyor. Ana gündem NATO Liderler Zirvesi
news.summary: Kabine toplantısı bugün Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan başkanlığında gerçekleştirilecek.

news.title: Anayasa Mahkemesi'nden CHP kararı. Amblem başvurusu karara bağlandı
news.summary: Anayasa Mahkemesi, CHP'nin talebi üzerine, Cumhuriyetçi Milletin Partisi'nin ambleminin siyasi partiler sicilinden silinmesine karar verdi. Karar, Cumhuriyetçi Milletin Partisi'nin CHP'nin amblemine benzer amblem kullanması üzerine alındı.

news.title: 16 yaşındaki kız "Rüyamda beni boğuyordu" diyerek annesini öldürdü
news.summary: Adana'da iki çocuk annesi Servet Tekir, 16 yaşındaki kızı tarafından bıçaklanarak öldürüldü. Rüyasında annesinin kendisini boğduğunu gören D.E. uyanınca annesini defalarca bıçakladığını öne sürdü.

news.title: Müge Anlı yeni sezon tarihi

news.title: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
news.summary: In areas devastated by the twin earthquakes, people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.

news.title: 'No one move!': The agonising silence as Venezuela rescuers listen for survivors
news.summary: With tens of thousands of people still believed missing, teams listen for signs of life beneath the rubble.

news.title: Six people shot dead at centre for mothers and children in Germany
news.summary: The male suspect who has been arrested was in a custody dispute over his baby daughter, police say.

news.title: One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
news.summary: While Trump celebrated a ruling expanding presidential power to remove and replace regulators, other decisions were major setbacks.

news.title: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
news.summary: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.

news.title: Pakistani strikes kill at least 28 civilians in Afghanistan, UN says
news.summary: Pakistan claims it was targeting militants near its border, but the Taliban government calls it an "atrocity".

news.title: Mourners light candles after deadly German shelter shooting
news.summary: Residents lit candles on Monday evening near the site of a shooting that killed six staff members at a German shelter.

news.title: Trump: US envoys enroute to Doha for ‘perhaps important’ Iran meeting
news.summary: President Donald Trump said US negotiators are heading to Qatar for what he called a ‘perhaps important’ meeting.

news.title: UN ordering 10,000 body bags for Venezuela as death toll expected to rise
news.summary: The UN says it is procuring 10,000 body bags for Venezuela, warning the death toll will rise.

news.title: Fears for people deported from US to Venezuela hours before earthquakes hit
news.summary: Search for deportees from US continues in the rubble of the hotel they were taken to in Venezuela's La Guaira city.

news.title: Fear grows in Johannesburg market as anti-migrant ‘deadline’ looms
news.summary: An unofficial June 30 deadline was set by anti-immigration groups for undocumented migrants to leave South Africa.

news.title: Paraguay coach salutes ‘extraordinary’ World Cup win over Germany
news.summary: Paraguay produced arguably the greatest World Cup upset as Germany was defeated 4-3 on penalties in the last 32.

news.title: Chinese billionaire Guo Wengui gets 30 years in U.S. prison for fraud conviction
news.summary: Guo said he came to the U.S. to destroy the Chinese Communist Party. But the judge said he instead diverted investor money to live lavishly.

news.title: Michigan governor threatens to pull troops from D.C. if used for Trump task force
news.summary: Michigan Gov. Whitmer is one of four Democrats who sent their states' National Guard troops to Washington, D.C. ahead of America 250 celebrations in recent weeks, amid President Trump's ongoing — and controversial — deployment in the city.

news.title: Wheelchair users say private equity is making repairs harder
news.summary: People who rely on wheelchairs say that industry consolidation driven by private equity means long delays in getting them fixed, which isolates them from society and endangers their health.

news.title: The Temporary Protected Status program may effectively be over. Here's what we know.
news.summary: A Supreme Court ruling gives the Trump administration space to strip this status from hundreds of thousands of more people from the few remaining countries with this program.

news.title: Supreme Court takes sledgehammer to much of federal government's regulatory structure
news.summary: The Supreme Court struck down most of the limits that Congress and the courts had previously established to protect the independence of regulatory agencies that comprise much of the federal government.

news.title: Venezuela's deadly quakes put its U.S.-backed government to the test
news.summary: Venezuela's La Guaira state bore the brunt of the earthquake damage, bringing memories of a 1999 disaster that became President Hugo Chávez's first major test. Now, it's the acting leader's challenge.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
